response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and capable software engineer, but his background fundamentally does not align with the mandatory requirements for this role. He lacks the required 5-10 years of C++ development on Windows, possessing only a brief 6-month stint using C/C++ over a decade ago. Furthermore, his recent experience is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, and he does not possess the requisite Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income domain expertise.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (10+ years) including Staff-level and Founder roles.
Strong background in modern development practices like TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development.
Demonstrated ability to learn and apply diverse technologies across full-stack and distributed systems.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience, with only ~6 months of professional C/C++ experience from 2014.
Missing required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income derivatives.
No demonstrated experience with enterprise SQL Server or Oracle databases on Windows platforms.
